description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs PHP_CodeSniffer on several PHP frameworks using dedicated Alpine Docker images. Add six jobs—phpcs-cakephp, phpcs-drupal, phpcs-laravel, phpcs-psr, phpcs-wordpress, and phpcs-yii—each set to allow_failure, using the images willhallonline/cakephp-phpcs:alpine, willhallonline/drupal-phpcs:alpine, willhallonline/laravel-phpcs:alpine, willhallonline/phpcs:alpine, willhallonline/wordpress-phpcs:alpine, and willhallonline/yii-phpcs:alpine respectively, and each executing the command `phpcs ./`. All jobs run in the default test stage.
